models.name: KAT-Coder-Pro-V2 (CodingPlan)
models.tooltip: Kuaishou Kwaipilot team's latest high-performance model, suitable for complex enterprise projects and SaaS integration, excellent performance in code scenarios, compatible with various Agent frameworks (Claude Code, OpenCode, KiloCode), natively compatible with OpenClaw, specially optimized for frontend page aesthetics.
